anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The accepted standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the resolved mechanism proves the public prediction-market board membrane through copied quant-helper source, synthetic fixtures, negative cases, and body-free receipts without granting market, provider, advice, or forecast authority.

statement: Microcosm Batch12 Prediction Market Board Capsule Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Batch12 Prediction Market Board Capsule Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A recurring Batch 12 prediction-market board rule about copied quant-helper source, synthetic fixture cases, negative cases, body-free receipts, or authority ceilings belongs at the standard level.

The change must propagate without granting live market truth, provider truth, forecast correctness, investment advice, provider dispatch, private equivalence, publication, release authority, or whole-system correctness.
workflow: Prove the invariant from the accepted standard, organ atlas row, runtime source locus, copied source-module bundle, mechanism evidence, fixture manifests, and receipts.
Update standards, validators, receipts, generated projections, and focused checks together so the rule is computed and not asserted.
Leave unsupported market-truth, provider-truth, forecast-correctness, advice, provider-dispatch, publication, release, private-equivalence, and whole-system claims as explicit residual pressure.
